changelog.1.5.1: Added 'metadata-awareness' rule. Fixed 'scanner.md' frontmatter for IDE visibility.
changelog.1.5.0: Added 'ask' agent for precise doubts and 'scanner' workflow for repo awareness. Consolidated documentation into a creative README.md.
